description_long: This is a cylindrical plastic bottle with a rounded shoulder and a wide, flat screw cap. The bottle is predominantly white, with a large, colorful label on the front featuring bold text and graphics. The label displays branding and product information, including the words 'Minoxidil' and 'Karkando Slandia', along with a skull and crossbones motif and images of people. The cap appears to be made of the same material as the bottle and is slightly domed. The bottle's surface is smooth and glossy, with no visible damage or deformation. The overall design suggests it is intended for containing a liquid or topical solution, commonly found in personal care or pharmaceutical contexts.
description: A white plastic bottle with a wide screw cap and a colorful, detailed label featuring branding and product information. The surface is smooth and glossy, with no visible damage.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen at an angle, showing part of the front label with text and graphics, and the rounded cap.
description_view_1: The back of the bottle is visible, showing a plain white surface with no label or markings.
description_view_2: A side view of the bottle, revealing the edge of the label and the smooth, unmarked white plastic body.
description_view_3: The front of the bottle is fully visible, displaying the entire label with branding, text, and images.
attribute_label_or_branding: The front label is colorful with a blue background, featuring the text 'KARKANDO SLANDIA', 'PIRATA!!!', 'ESTE SIM É! MINOXIDIL', and 'Topical Solution USP 5% Hair Regrowth Treatment', along with a skull and crossbones graphic and images of people. The label uses bold fonts and multiple colors including white, yellow, red, and black.
